assertions.rationale: SKILL.md setup section shows `dotnet add package Duende.UserManagement.IdentityServer8`

assertions.assertion: Adds Duende.Storage.Sqlite NuGet package (or references it)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `dotnet add package Duende.Storage.Sqlite` in the packages section.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddUserManagement() on the IdentityServer builder with a configuration lambda
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `.AddUserManagement(options => { ... });` on the IdentityServer builder.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddSqliteStore() inside the AddUserManagement options lambda (not at top level)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `options.AddSqliteStore("Data Source=users.db");` inside the lambda and warns against top-level placement.

assertions.assertion: Calls IDatabaseSchema.CreateIfNotExistsAsync() to ensure database schema exists
